title: Wintry Woods [#summit26]
description: [Created for the Welded Woodlands]\r\n\r\nWith the highest part of the mountain covered in snow, many many creative individuals decided to share their own creations with the world! As they set their booths on the snowy floor, the forest started singing to them... a mysterious, yet calm melody kept them safe from the dangers of the woods.

title: World Shattering Providence (Smithed Mix)
description:
Remixed for Smithed Summit 2026
I couldn't help myself. From the start I felt this song would fit with a couple changes. Sooo..... here we are.

#summit26
Minecraft IGN: LoginatorV
[Welded Woodlands]

title: Welded Woodlands - With Hands Raised To The Sky
description:
#summit26 [Welded Woodlands]

with hands raised to the sky aims to embody exploration and discovery in the harsh cold, having an INTENSE up and down story to it
this song is a little bit overdramatic, being the first song i made for the jam, but hey, what can i say i did a pretty good job on it

title: Textured Tropics - Bamboo Bossa
description: #summit26 [Textured Tropics]\r\n\r\nthis location felt like my call to stray even more from my typical style, leading me more into the percussion (which i love to neglect), making an exotic feel out of silverfish maracas and whatever sounds the bamboo hit noise represents :3

title: Patched Plateaus - A Place To Be Alive (Among The Sunflowers)
description:
#summit26 [Patched Plateaus]

the main thing i notice about the patched plateaus is the beautiful sunflower fields that break up the city!
this song, having some loose inspiration from the Lewis Armstrong tune What A Wonderful World, aims to embody skipping through the fields and stopping to smell the flowers!

title: Canyon Layer (Smithed Summit 2026 ver.)
description:
"Canyon Layer" from Donkey Kong Bananza modified for Smithed Summit 2026.

#summit26
[Welded Woodlands]
Minecraft username: Creeper_Juice

I chose this song because I thought it fit the "industrial", "serious" and "suspenseful" themes of the Welded Woodlands prompt. I changed many instruments to make it feel cold and snowy instead of dry and canyon-y. I also slowed the song down to make it feel more serious.

title: Forest Layer: Eggshell Hotel (Smithed Summit 2026 ver.)
description:
"Forest Layer: Eggshell Hotel" from Donkey Kong Bananza modified for Smithed Summit 2026.

#summit26
[Textured Tropics]
Minecraft username: Creeper_Juice

I chose this song because I thought it fit the "tropical", "warm" and "vacation" themes of the Textured Tropics prompt. I changed a couple instruments to make it even more tropical and added some bamboo sounds to the percussion for the "jungle" and "bamboo shoots" parts of the prompt.

Note: I haven't made a "normal" cover of this song. I've only made this version for Smithed Summit 2026.

title: Welcome To The City (Smithed Summit 2026 ver.)
description:
"Welcome To The City" from DELTARUNE Chapter 2 modified for Smithed Summit 2026.

#summit26
[Patched Plateaus]
Minecraft username: Creeper_Juice

I chose this song because I thought it fit all the themes of the Patched Plateaus prompt ("city", "colorful", "modern" and "playful"). I changed some instruments and changed the main melody to a guitar so it would feel less "cyber" and more "outdoor-like".
